memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with low energy and sleep debt, so attending leisure now seems like the best option before tackling my term project.
The 1-hour trivial task yielded minimal progress (0.09), confirming low energy limits output efficiency despite the instant win feeling.
The trivial task yielded minimal progress despite feeling like a win, confirming my low energy severely limits efficiency on the main project.
Procrastinating on the term project compounds future stress, so I should work now despite low energy to avoid Thursday crunch.
Working 2 hours increased project progress to 0.38, yet my energy and stress remain high with only 2 days left.
Working on a trivial task yielded minimal progress, reinforcing that my low energy severely limits efficiency on the main project.
A quick trivial task provided minimal progress, confirming that my current low energy and high stress severely limit efficiency on the main project.
My energy remains critically low after two days of work, confirming that high stress severely limits my efficiency on the main project.
Working on a trivial task yielded minimal progress, confirming that my low energy and high stress severely limit efficiency on the main project.
The deadline for the trivial task passed unfinished, confirming that my low energy and high stress continue to severely limit my efficiency.
Despite low energy and high stress, the Term project made measurable progress (0.38 to 0.44) in 1.5 hours, suggesting that even limited effort yields results.
Sleeping only 1 hour increased my energy slightly but left a sleep debt, confirming that rest is insufficient without quality recovery.
